title: Хийтмап трейдинг за за напреднали и начинаещи
author: TradeTravelChill
summary_bullets: If someone was surprised by why the price of the spear is at the same level, it is there after the explosion, or why you take 100% with one spike and one is back.
In 90% of the points, the answer is the same.
In this video, I will show you how to see them in real time through hipmaps.

Until the end of the video, you will know what the hipmap is, how to distinguish the real orders from the false ones, what are the spoofing orders, what is Iceberg actually and how to use this information in order to avoid the spoofing and to get better at the entrance.
The hipmap is a visual instrument that shows where the orders are found in the folder book.
That is, what prices are expected, if the amount of money is bought or sold.
Imagine it as a thermal market card.
The more bright the color is given on the level, the more orders there are.
These zones are important because they often work as a temporary resistance support.
The prices are attracted to the magnet, showing where the large participants are ready to interact with the market.

extracted_rules: If someone was surprised by why the price of the spear is at the same level, it is there after the explosion, or why you take 100% with one spike and one is back.

The real power comes when you combine it with the structure, liquidity and volume.
If you press Buy Market, you buy in one of the closest prices.
And when there is a huge limit of order in one place, it can make the price, to play the movement, to create a bounce, or to be the file or the output, and then the price to pass aggressively.
This means that if there is a 100 Bitcoin limit order short, it should enter more aggressive buyers on this level to fill all these 100 orders and to continue the price up.
If in the situation, limit orders manage to absorb all aggressive buyers with their short limit positions, the price would go back and hold this level.
But if the aggressive buyers are significantly more than these limit orders, this means that they will start filling them little by little and then they will continue up.
Because if you are a child you will be absolutely all these market makers orders that sit around the price and just play with sales.
